ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, KRISTEN D SHOUSE AKA KRISTEN SHOUSE'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. $75 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE DEDUCTED FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S PAYCHECK TOWARDS SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT. COURT SHALL PREPARE AND MAIL OUT A FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, Kristen D Shouse aka Kristen Shouse's claim of exemption is granted in part. $75 per pay period will be deducted from the judgment debtor's paycheck towards satisfaction of the judgment. Court shall prepare and mail out a formal order to parties and the Sheriff's Office. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
